metadata.description: ERA5 climatology for GB Grid Scenario Tool

variables.wind_ms: 100m wind speed (m/s) — raw ERA5, apply your own power curve
variables.wind_cf: Wind capacity factor (IEC cubic ramp: cut-in=3, rated=12, cut-out=25 m/s)
variables.solar_jm2: Surface solar radiation downwards (J/m² per hour) — raw ERA5
variables.solar_cf: Solar capacity factor (85% efficiency, DAYLIGHT HOURS ONLY)

metadata.solar_method: Solar percentiles computed from daylight hours only (solar elevation > 0° at zone centroid, Spencer 1971). Each season/zone entry includes daylight_fraction showing what proportion of hours are daylight. Front-end: zone_solar_mw = installed_mw × solar_cf × daylight_fraction
metadata.wind_method: IEC cubic ramp power curve applied to ERA5 100m wind speed. CF includes all hours (wind can blow at night).
